detail: Model dropped the constraint subject 'me' and erroneously claimed the payload was missing entity information (flight identifier).
Model invented alternative actions (downgrade budget, expand search area) not present in the IR, treating hard constraints as soft preferences.
Model interpreted 'timeout(30s)' as a trigger condition (wait 30s then act) rather than a temporal bound (complete within 30s).
Model misread the else-branch structure: treated escalate(manager) as an unconditional post-action rather than part of the alternative branch.
Model substituted the primary action target 'ticket' with 'billing_department', injecting a target not present in the IR.
Model interpreted 'rating>=4.5' as a user's personal score rather than a filter criterion for restaurant search results.
Model API timed out; no response received. No rule-judge fallback possible (empty response).
Judge model (glm-5.2) timed out during evaluation. Rule-judge fallback applied (fail: missing constraint 'true').
Model invented conditions not in IR (source text empty, style unmatched) and fabricated degradation alternatives (archaic_heavy → archaic).
Model reinterpreted '>' operator as 'belongs to / is a subset of' instead of 'greater than', and added default outdoor-activity logic not in IR.
Model treated the alternatives list as parallel simultaneous actions rather than a fallback sequence, and hallucinated 'billing_department' as primary target.
Model misread the translation pipeline (src→tgt with style) as three independent style-transformations applied in parallel to the input.
Model added unsuggested operations (relax conditions, search nearby areas, confirm filters) beyond the IR's booking intent.
Model interpreted 'if timeout(30s)' as a conditional trigger (if timeout occurs, then act) rather than a temporal bound for the action sequence.
